channel.title: Vie Claire — Personal Finance Blog
channel.description: Personal finance education: budgeting, investing, FIRE, market history. Practical wisdom for real humans.

item.title: 🔥 A Practical FIRE Strategy for Beginners: Start Early, Save Smart
item.description: Learn a practical FIRE strategy for beginners with simple steps to save more, invest wisely, and build a realistic path to financial independence and early retirement.

item.title: ☕ Your Daily Coffee Isn't Why You're Broke
item.description: The avocado toast police have been lying to you. Your financial problems are probably bigger, and more fixable, than a latte.

item.title: 📈 A Simple Portfolio Strategy for Long-Term Wealth
item.description: Learn a simple portfolio strategy for building long-term wealth with diversified index funds, asset allocation, rebalancing, and disciplined investing.

item.title: 💡 Automating Your Personal Finances
item.description: Learn how automating your personal finances can simplify budgeting, boost savings, reduce missed payments, and help you invest consistently for long-term financial growth.

item.title: 📊 Bitcoin vs Gold vs Stocks: A Historical Comparison
item.description: Compare Bitcoin, gold, and stocks through history: returns, volatility, inflation performance, drawdowns, and portfolio roles across major market cycles.

item.title: 📈 Dividend Investing vs Index Investing
item.description: Compare dividend investing vs index investing by returns, income, taxes, diversification, and risk. Learn which strategy may fit your long-term investing goals.

item.title: 📈 Dollar Cost Averaging Explained
item.description: Learn what dollar cost averaging is, how it works, its advantages and drawbacks, and when investors use it to reduce timing risk and build long-term wealth.

item.title: 📈 ETF Investing for Beginners in Europe: A Practical Starter Guide
item.description: Learn how ETF investing works for beginners in Europe, including UCITS ETFs, costs, taxes, brokers, and how to build a simple diversified portfolio.

item.title: 📊 Gold Price Cycles and What They Mean for Investors
item.description: Explore gold price cycles, what drives them, and what they mean for investors. Learn how inflation, interest rates, crises, and market sentiment shape gold’s long-term performance.

item.title: 📊 Gold vs Inflation: A Historical Analysis of Its Hedge Value
item.description: Explore how gold has performed against inflation across history, when it protects purchasing power, and why its hedge value rises and falls over time.

item.title: 📊 Gold vs Stocks: 50 Years of Performance and Returns
item.description: Compare gold vs stocks over the past 50 years, including returns, volatility, inflation protection, and when each asset performed best for long-term investors.

item.title: 📊 Gold vs Stocks vs Real Estate
item.description: Compare gold, stocks, and real estate using 50 years of historical data. See long-term returns, volatility, inflation hedging, drawdowns, and portfolio trade-offs.

item.title: 📈 How Compound Interest Builds Wealth Over Time: A Simple Guide
item.description: Learn how compound interest builds wealth over time, why starting early matters, and how small, consistent investments can grow into substantial long-term savings.

item.title: 🔥 How Inflation Affects Financial Independence
item.description: Learn how inflation affects financial independence, from rising living costs and withdrawal rates to portfolio strategy, savings goals, and long-term purchasing power.

item.title: 📊 How Markets Recovered After Every Major Crash
item.description: Explore how markets recovered after every major crash, from 1929 to 2020. Learn the timelines, key drivers of recovery, and practical lessons for long-term investors.

item.title: 📈 How Much to Invest Monthly to Reach Financial Freedom
item.description: Learn how much you need to invest each month to reach financial freedom, with simple examples, return assumptions, and planning tips.

item.title: 🧠 How Opportunity Cost Explains Most Financial Mistakes
item.description: Learn how opportunity cost drives common financial mistakes, from overspending and bad investments to cash drag and missed compounding, with practical examples and investor insight.

item.title: 🔥 How to Build Passive Income With ETFs: A Practical Guide
item.description: Learn how to build passive income with ETFs using dividend, bond, and covered call funds. Explore strategies, risks, and portfolio ideas for steady cash flow.

item.title: 🔥 How to Calculate Your Financial Independence Number Step by Step
item.description: Learn how to calculate your financial independence number using annual spending, safe withdrawal rates, and simple examples.

item.title: 📊 How Economic Cycles Influence Investments
item.description: Learn how economic cycles influence investments across stocks, bonds, real estate, and commodities. Understand each phase of the cycle and how investors can adapt.

item.title: 📈 How to Choose the Right ETF Portfolio
item.description: Learn how to choose the right ETF portfolio based on your goals, risk tolerance, time horizon, costs, and diversification needs. A practical guide for long-term investors.

item.title: 📊 How Inflation Destroys Wealth Over Time
item.description: Learn how inflation quietly erodes purchasing power, reduces real investment returns, and destroys wealth over time. Discover why it happens and how to protect your money.

item.title: 📈 How to Invest €500 Per Month: Smart Strategies to Build Wealth
item.description: Learn how to invest €500 per month with practical strategies for ETFs, diversification, risk management, and long-term wealth building.

item.title: 🧠 How Money Changes Your Relationship With Time
item.description: Discover how money reshapes your relationship with time, from freedom and flexibility to stress, status, and long-term choices. Learn why income, wealth, and financial security change how you spend your life.

item.title: 💡 How to Live Below Your Means: Practical Habits to Save More
item.description: Learn how to live below your means with practical budgeting habits, smarter spending decisions, and simple strategies to save more money and build long-term financial security.

item.title: 📊 Inflation and Monetary Systems
item.description: Explore how inflation works within different monetary systems, why prices rise, and how central banks, fiat money, and history shape purchasing power and economic stability.

item.title: 🔥 How to Reach Financial Independence With an Average Salary
item.description: Learn how to reach financial independence with an average salary using practical budgeting, saving, investing, and debt reduction strategies that build long-term wealth.

item.title: 📊 Inflation Over the Last 100 Years
item.description: Explore inflation over the last 100 years, from wartime price shocks and 1970s stagflation to modern central banking, globalization, and post-pandemic inflation.

item.title: 📈 How to Rebalance an Investment Portfolio: A Practical Guide
item.description: Learn how to rebalance an investment portfolio, when to do it, and which strategies help manage risk, maintain asset allocation, and keep long-term goals on track.

item.title: 💡 How to Reduce Monthly Expenses Without Feeling Poor
item.description: Learn how to reduce monthly expenses without feeling deprived. Use practical budgeting, spending cuts, and smart money habits to save more while keeping your lifestyle enjoyable.

item.title: 📊 Lessons From the 2008 Financial Crisis
item.description: Explore the most important lessons from the 2008 financial crisis, including leverage, housing risk, bank failures, regulation, and practical investor takeaways.

item.title: 📈 How to Save €10,000 in One Year: A Practical Step-by-Step Plan
item.description: Learn how to save €10,000 in one year with a realistic monthly plan, budgeting tips, expense cuts, and income-boosting strategies that actually work.

item.title: 📊 Lessons From the Dot-Com Bubble: Key Investor Insights for Today
item.description: Explore the biggest lessons from the Dot-Com Bubble, including speculation, valuation mistakes, market psychology, and what modern investors can learn from the crash.

item.title: 💡 How to Save 50% of Your Income: Practical Strategies That Work
item.description: Learn how to save 50% of your income with practical budgeting, spending, and income-boosting strategies. Build wealth faster with a realistic savings plan.

item.title: 💡 How to Track Expenses Efficiently: Simple Methods That Work
item.description: Learn how to track expenses efficiently with simple tools, smart budgeting habits, and practical tips to monitor spending, reduce waste, and improve financial control.

item.title: 🧠 The €20,000 Car That Actually Cost €70,000
item.description: Discover how a €20,000 car can end up costing €70,000 over time once financing, depreciation, insurance, fuel, maintenance, taxes, and hidden ownership costs are included.

item.title: 📈 Long-Term Investing Strategies That Work
item.description: Discover long-term investing strategies that work, including diversification, dollar-cost averaging, index funds, dividend reinvestment, and risk management to build lasting wealth.

item.title: 📊 Long-Term Stock Market Returns Explained: What Drives Growth
item.description: Learn what long-term stock market returns are, what drives them, how historical averages compare with inflation, and what investors should realistically expect over time.

item.title: 🧠 The Concept of “Enough” in Personal Finance
item.description: Explore the concept of “enough” in personal finance and learn how to define financial sufficiency, align money with values, avoid lifestyle inflation, and build lasting peace of mind.

item.title: 🧠 Opportunity Cost and the Value of Time
item.description: Learn how opportunity cost and the value of time shape investing, spending, and career decisions. Discover practical examples, historical context, and smarter ways to allocate capital and attention.

item.title: 🧠 Opportunity Cost Applied: Real-World Examples for Better
item.description: Learn how opportunity cost works in practice, from investing and saving to career and business choices. See real-world examples and use it to make better financial decisions.

item.title: 🔥 The Couple Who Reached Financial Independence in 15 Years
item.description: Learn how one couple achieved financial independence in 15 years through disciplined saving, smart investing, lifestyle choices, and long-term planning.

item.title: 🧠 Opportunity Cost in Everyday Life
item.description: Learn what opportunity cost means in everyday life, with simple examples on spending, saving, work, and time so you can make smarter daily decisions.

item.title: 🧠 The Day Someone Realized Their Salary Would Never Make Them Free
item.description: A powerful look at the moment someone realizes a paycheck alone won’t create financial freedom, and why wealth comes from assets, ownership, and long-term investing.

item.title: 🧠 Opportunity Cost: The Hidden Price of Every Financial Decision
item.description: Learn how opportunity cost shapes every financial decision, from spending and saving to investing and career choices, and discover practical ways to make smarter money decisions.

item.title: 🧠 The Difference Between a Rich Life and an Expensive Life
item.description: Learn the difference between a rich life and an expensive life, and why fulfillment, freedom, and values matter more than status spending and lifestyle inflation.

item.title: 📊 A Century of Inflation: How Money Loses Value Over Time
item.description: Explore a century of inflation and learn how money loses value over time, why prices rise, what drives purchasing power down, and how inflation shapes savings, wages, and investing.

item.title: 🧠 Spending vs Investing: How to Think About Money
item.description: Learn the difference between spending and investing, how each shapes your finances, and a practical framework for making smarter money decisions over time.

item.title: 📊 Equities, Bonds and Gold: A Century of Performance Compared
item.description: Compare 100 years of equities, bonds and gold performance across inflation, recessions, wars and rate cycles. Learn how each asset behaved and why.

item.title: 🧠 The Difference Between Looking Rich and Being Wealthy
item.description: Learn the real difference between looking rich and being wealthy. Discover how spending habits, assets, cash flow, and long-term investing separate appearances from true financial independence.
